'''dhatava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalamus|thalamus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalamus|thalamus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhatava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhætævæth|dhætævæth]] || [[word:dhætævæj|dhætævæj]] || [[word:dhætævæsh|dhætævæsh]] || [[word:dhætævæ|dhætævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhatatavath|dhatatavath]] || [[word:dhatatavaj|dhatatavaj]] || [[word:dhatatavash|dhatatavash]] || [[word:dhatatava|dhatatava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhatavath|dhatavath]] || [[word:dhatavaj|dhatavaj]] || [[word:dhatavash|dhatavash]] || [[word:dhatava|dhatava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhatafvath|dhatafvath]] || [[word:dhatafvaj|dhatafvaj]] || [[word:dhatafvash|dhatafvash]] || [[word:dhatafvaf|dhatafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhatavatha|dhatavatha]] || [[word:dhatavaja|dhatavaja]] || [[word:dhatavasha|dhatavasha]] || [[word:dhatavaka|dhatavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhatavath|dhatavath]] || [[word:dhatavaj|dhatavaj]] || [[word:dhatavash|dhatavash]] || [[word:dhatava|dhatava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhatavathal|dhatavathal]] || [[word:dhatavajal|dhatavajal]] || [[word:dhatavashal|dhatavashal]] || [[word:dhatavakal|dhatavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhatavathatha|dhatavathatha]] || [[word:dhatavajaja|dhatavajaja]] || [[word:dhatavashasha|dhatavashasha]] || [[word:dhatavaka|dhatavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhatavathan|dhatavathan]] || [[word:dhatavajan|dhatavajan]] || [[word:dhatavashan|dhatavashan]] || [[word:dhatavakan|dhatavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhatavathaoro|dhatavathaoro]] || [[word:dhatavajaoro|dhatavajaoro]] || [[word:dhatavashaoro|dhatavashaoro]] || [[word:dhatavakaoro|dhatavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
